info.title: WHO PreQualificaiton Presentation  Schema API

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-PreQualPresentation
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-PreQualPresentation.

ValueSet-PreQualPresentation.title: WHO PreQualificaiton Presentation  Schema
ValueSet-PreQualPresentation.description: JSON Schema for WHO PreQualificaiton Presentation  ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
ValueSet-PreQualPresentation.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the WHO PreQualificaiton Presentation  ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/pcmt-vaxprequal/ValueSet-PreQualPresentation.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
